name: Keisuke Iranami
description:
Keisuke is a tall young man with tan skin, bright yellow eyes, and long shoulder-length hair. His hair is tied onto a single ponytail and rests over his shoulder.

He wears the standard security department uniform, which consists of; a black coat, a black vest with numerous pockets, a pair of black pants, and a pair of black boots. His coat hs the Kisaragi Foundation's logo imprinted on it by the shoulder and by his arm. He wears a microphone piece around his left ear.
creator: DanganRonpa?!!
